title: Ade Gardner
extract:
Adrian Antonio Gardner (born 24 June 1983) is an English former professional rugby league footballer, who spent the vast majority of his career with St Helens in the Super League. He was an England and Great Britain representative winger.
He began his career at his home town club, Barrow Raiders, and after 11 years at St Helens, ended his playing days with a season loan move to Hull Kingston Rovers.
